series_metadata.series_title: Ohio Administrative Code Rules and Medicaid Eligibility
series_metadata.series_description: Record contains policy letters, manual transmittal letters and action change letters; historical documentation which includes CRIS-E reports; memorandums and administrative decision support documents. File also includes public assistance policy and OAC rules of reference.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: in office area and in records center no longer of administrative value and audits are completed, audit reports released and all discrepancies are resolved. Review by State Archives prior disposition. ; Electronic: superseded, obsolete or replaced
